title: Wano Splits Between Udon and the Flower Capital
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Sanji, Luffy as The Wano rebellion spreads between Udon prison, the Flower Capital, and the first shocks around Komurasaki and Orochi.
scene: The rebellion’s pieces scatter across Wano while Luffy struggles in Udon and Orochi’s court grows unstable in the Flower Capital.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Why do we have to run too?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: HAA- HAA-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: You knocked one out, didn't ya?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Whereze

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: whereze

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But the Soba shopowner's the one they're after!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No matter the pretext, if any of you are found,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They'll turn the whole island upside down looking for everyone else!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's bad! Nami and Robin will be in danger!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Everyone! If they catch you, don't you dare say a word

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: About the Samurai or the minks! Die without divulging a single secret!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're insane! Luffy would never say something like that!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I'm a bit drier.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What about hiding our faces and then fighting?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: If you're 100% sure you can win!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A single wound could reduce our strength at the final battle! Don't fight now!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: You're officially the worst captain ever!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If they catch me, I'm going to spill the beans and save myself!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Are you seri- ours?! Fine, I'll just protect you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Yay!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What the hell is wrong with you two?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Kyaaaah!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: A lady?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: A house?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: What's going on?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Stop it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: We've got nothing to do with this!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Yer a Soba stall!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Yes, we sell soba, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Our shop... We'll be kicked out of the capital!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Tell us where the other SOBA stalls are!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Or scream out "Sangoro" as loudly as you can!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Call out for the idiot that raised his hand against the Kyoshiro family!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: A response to

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Sangoro!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Get out here, damn it!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hihihi! That coward's probably never going to show his face.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Ahh. Let's go eat some fruits next.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Sangoro! Get out here!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Come out, sangoro! Take responsibility for what you've done!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Oi! Wait! Sanji!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Stop, please! We've got nothing to do with this either!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Then bring him out! Sangoro the Soba seller!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I'm right here!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Udon and Flower Capital storyline with 44 dialogue beats. Luffy’s prison struggle, Big Mom’s amnesia, and the Flower Capital drama show Wano’s rebellion becoming harder to control.
